title: MetadataCostSnapshot
description: A fresh, hash-bound Databento unit-price snapshot for one dataset and feed mode, plus the derived cost estimate it backs. Monetary values are decimal strings; the divisor is exactly 2**30 bytes per billing GiB.

feed_mode.description: Bound feed mode; the paid path uses historical-streaming.

schema_prices.description: Schema-to-unit-price mapping in USD per billing GiB, as decimal strings.

snapshot_hash.description: Canonical SHA-256 binding dataset, feed mode, client version, timestamps, schema prices, and calculation version.
